code:
def generate_subsets_using_bits(elements):
    n = len(elements)
    all_subsets = []
    
    for i in range(1 << n):  # Iterate from 0 to 2^n - 1
        current_subset = []
        for j in range(n):
            if (i >> j) & 1:  # Check if the j-th bit is set in i
                current_subset.append(elements[j])
        all_subsets.append(current_subset)
        
    return all_subsets
prompt: Generate all possible subsets using bits yaz.
